#  Add Observations to a Drawing 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To add observations to a drawing,_ 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings AND Observations tools.
    * _To publish personal markups to the Published layer_ , 'Standard' or 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool. See [What is the difference between personal and published markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Open** next to the drawing you want to mark up.  
Note: You can also click **Info** next to the drawing, then click **Open in Viewer / Markup**.
  3. Click the **Markup** icon. See [Mark Up a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing). ![Markup In The Drawing Toolbar](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/690eed7f1b889b05c32e8c1fa29218f8/97849b368c8d5070d7b9f4577cc64966/markup-in-the-drawing-toolbar.jpg?fm=webp&h=40)
  4. Click the **Pins** icon on the markup toolbar.   
_Note:_ If you do not see 'Pins'_,_ another pin markup option (such as Photos, Punch, or Issue) may already be selected. Clicking any one of the pin options will expand the options to show Observations.
  5. Select the **Observations** icon. ![Drawings Toolbar Observation](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ae00f764209d7a28e9afde66d5ce2ff5/7efea782ead7e97060b321ccf29c5405/drawings-toolbar-observation.png?fm=webp&h=55)
  6. Click the area of the drawing you want to add the observation to.
  7. In the Link an Observation box, begin typing to search for the observation you want to add.  
_Tip!_ Double-click to bring up a list of all the observations in the project that you have access to.
  8. Click the observation that you want to add to the drawing.  
_Note_ : The color of the pin denotes the status of the observation.
     * **Blue** : Initiated
     * **Yellow** : Ready for Review
     * **Red** : Not Accepted
     * **Gray** : Closed


##  Next Steps 
  * [Publish Personal Drawing Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups)
